name: History page lists past activity or a clear empty state
description: The History page shows past Feynman explanations, video sessions, or research queries as dated entries with type badges, or a clear empty state inviting the user to start studying — never a blank panel.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the History link in the sidebar

Verify the History page shows EITHER a list of past activity entries, each grouped under a date and carrying a type badge (such as Feynman, Video, or Research), OR an explicit empty-state message encouraging the user to start studying — confirming the view rendered real content and not an empty container
